compressed_prompt: List pros/cons of supernatural powers in json. Use markdown ticks. No commas.
response:
```json
{
  "supernatural_powers": {
    "pros": [
      "Ability to help others in ways normal humans cannot"
      "Protection from physical harm"
      "Access to knowledge beyond normal human understanding"
      "Ability to travel quickly or teleport"
      "Enhanced strength and endurance"
      "Potential to solve large scale global problems"
      "Freedom from physical limitations"
    ]
    "cons": [
      "Isolation from normal human relationships"
      "Potential for misuse or corruption"
      "Unwanted attention or persecution from others"
      "Psychological burden of responsibility"
      "Difficulty controlling powers"
      "Possible physical or mental side effects"
      "Moral dilemmas about when and how to use powers"
    ]
  }
}
```
